rows.material_reasoning: Well established use for cleaning components and circuit boards prior to final assembly.
rows.country_reasoning: Based on recent industry and chemical production reports (2022-2023) indicating the US as the largest IPA producer; data verified by national chemical associations and USGS chemical production summaries. High confidence but some production data is corporate-sensitive.

rows.material_reasoning: Well established use for cleaning components and circuit boards prior to final assembly.
rows.country_reasoning: China is the second largest producer with data from China National Chemical Industry reports (2022); data is robust and well-documented with government statistics but subject to some state disclosure limits.

rows.material_reasoning: Well established use for cleaning components and circuit boards prior to final assembly.
rows.country_reasoning: Indian chemical industry reports and government export data show significant IPA production; moderately confident due to some data lag and variability in reporting.

rows.material_reasoning: Well established use for cleaning components and circuit boards prior to final assembly.
rows.country_reasoning: European chemical industry sources and Federal Statistical Office data confirm Germany as a leading IPA producer; moderate confidence due to approximate export figures and plant capacity changes.

rows.material_reasoning: Well established use for cleaning components and circuit boards prior to final assembly.

rows.material_reasoning: Widely used consumable in electronics assembly to ensure proper soldering.
rows.country_reasoning: Based on recent industrial chemical production reports and market analyses, China is the largest producer of soldering flux with well-documented manufacturing statistics in 2022-2023; confidence high due to data from chemical industry sources but some variability in reporting.

rows.material_reasoning: Widely used consumable in electronics assembly to ensure proper soldering.
rows.country_reasoning: The US hosts significant specialty chemical manufacturing for soldering flux, corroborated by industry reports and trade data up to 2023; data is reliable though some production is imported/exported affecting exact figures.

rows.material_reasoning: Widely used consumable in electronics assembly to ensure proper soldering.
